title: REM Poster Case Study
description: A visual case study that turns REM principles into a clean, research-backed poster system for fast understanding.
outcome: Improved clarity for presenting REM concepts in class and review sessions.

title: Cloud VM Setup
description: Provisioned a Linux virtual machine, configured the runtime, and deployed a web application with network access.
outcome: A live cloud environment with a reproducible setup flow for future deployments.

title: Netra AI
description: A multimodal AI prototype combining computer vision and model-driven analysis for a smart screening workflow.
outcome: Presented as a Smart India Hackathon project with an end-to-end demo flow.

title: Veda ML
description: A plant detection and medicinal classification system designed around practical data gathering and inference.
outcome: Helped shape a useful classification workflow for educational and research use.
